embed.title: !location
embed.description: Set your location — the point that distance filters (`d:<metres>`) measure from.

fields.name: By address
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}location 10 Downing Street, London`

Requires the operator to have configured a geocoder (Nominatim / Photon / Google).

fields.name: By area name
fields.value: `{{prefix}}location north_london` — if there's an area with that name, location is set to that area's centre point

fields.name: Clear
fields.value: `{{prefix}}location` (with no argument) — removes your location. Any tracking rule with `d:<metres>` will stop firing until you set it again.

fields.name: Related
fields.value: `{{prefix}}area` — set areas for area-based tracking (no distance required)
